_comment: Black Zone Jobs — Core Rules Appendix III (pp.91-92)
_rules_reference: Near-suicide missions for Unity government. Requires 10+ turns in Red Zone first.

access_requirements.description: Must have played at least 10 campaign turns in a Red Zone.

advantages.description: No Rival interference, no Upkeep, loan frozen, 3 free Weapon Table rolls.

mission_types.name: Destroy Strong Point
mission_types.description: Reach the center of the battlefield, spend an Action and roll 1D6+Savvy. On 5+, charges are set. Detonate as Free Action — all within 1D6+3 inches become casualties. You Win.

mission_types.name: Hold Against Assault
mission_types.description: Hold out for 10 rounds. You Win at end of Round 10.

mission_types.name: Eliminate Priority Target
mission_types.description: Place target 6 inches onto battlefield from enemy edge center. Toughness 5, cannot be fired upon beyond 20 inches. Eliminate to Win. Target does not move but may fire.

mission_types.name: Penetrate the Lines
mission_types.description: At least 2 crew members must exit the opposing battlefield edge to Win.

setup.description: No Notable Sights or Deployment Conditions. May roll to Seize Initiative with +1 bonus.

opposition.description: Roving Threats only. 4 teams of 4 at midway. New passive team each round from random neutral edge.

active_passive_rules.passive: Does not move or fight the round placed. At end of each round, assign number to each passive team and roll 1D6. If matches, becomes Active.
active_passive_rules.description: Passive teams activate when fired upon, crew within 8 inches, or D6 roll matches their number.

ending.flee_description: Any crew member that flees automatically becomes a casualty and must test for post-battle Injuries.
ending.description: Win: evac'd at end of following round. Flee: each fleeing crew member becomes casualty.

failure.description: Normal failed rewards. Unity pays 1 credit per crew casualty.

victory.description: Clear ALL Rivals, +2 persistent Patrons, 5 credits, pay off 5 loan, 3 Loot rolls, +1 XP all crew.
